The only way for Orinda to occur in 12 ABY and Nam Chorios in 13 ABY is if Nam Chorios was within a month of the division between the two years, meaning it must occur in 48:3. This means that Orinda must occur in 48:2, a month earlier.</ref>

{{Quote|The New Republic pushed Pellaeon back, but suffered a grave defeat in the Battle of Orinda. There, the ''Reaper'' destroyed most of Antilles's starfighters by annihilating the ﬂeet carrier ''Endurance''.|[[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]]|<ref name="TNEC" />}}
The '''Battle of Orinda''' was fought late in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] about [[12 ABY/Legends|eight years after]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and seven months after the resignation of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]].

==Background==
{{Quote|Six months after Daala relinquished her command, Pellaeon made an aggressive lunge at the New Republic by seizing the small planet Orinda. By the time General Antilles mounted a counterattack, Pellaeon had already captured six neighboring systems.|Voren Na'al|<ref name="TNEC" />}}
After the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]], led by the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Reaper (Executor-class)|''Reaper'']], under the command of [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], had successfully captured several of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Orinda campaign]]; the New Republic attempted a counterattack at [[Orinda/Legends|Orinda]], one of the planets captured by the [[Imperial Remnant]] one month earlier.

A fleet under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and his flagship, the ''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'', was dispatched to Orinda to face off against the fleet of Pellaeon.<ref name="Warfare" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|Rogue Squadron, stationed aboard the ''Lusankya'', covered the ﬂeet's retreat. The New Republic chose to leave Orinda in imperial hands, and instead fortified the surrounding systems.|Voren Na'al|<ref name="TNEC" />}}
The Battle of Orinda was one of the few known events where ''Executor''-class Star Dreadnoughts fought one another.<ref name="Warfare" />

The turn of the battle in favor of the Remnant came with the arrival of another [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]], the [[Dominion (Star Dreadnought)|''Dominion'']], commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Teren Rogriss]], and six [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruisers]]. Between them and the ''Reaper'' they rapidly destroyed the New Republic fleet carrier [[Endurance (Endurance-class)|''Endurance'']] with all [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] aboard after her captain had held the starfighters in reserve for as long as possible. Antilles was prepared to order an abandon ship until his own fighters were able to push a hole in the Interdictor screen and allow ''Lusankya''{{'s}} retreat under heavy fire. No further attempt was made to recover Orinda from the Remnant.<ref name="Warfare" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Despite few scattered victories, including the Battle of Orinda and the requisition of his former flagship ''Chimaera'' in the Battle of Gravlex Med, he had been unable to stop the march of history.|Voren Na'al, about Admiral Pellaeon|<ref name="TNEC" />}}
After the victory, Orinda became the temporary headquarters of Admiral Gilad Pellaeon.<ref name="Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 2">[[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 2|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 2]]</ref> The New Republic chose to leave Orinda in Imperial hands and instead fortified surrounding systems. The Battle of Orinda was one of the last Imperial victories against the New Republic.<ref name="TNEC" />
